Day advanced to 2026-03-25.
10,073 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-24 -> 2026-03-25)

- "Which team will Kosovo host in the men's 2026 FIFA World Cup European playoff final on March 31, 2026?" → Turkiye
- "From whom will Donald Trump say he received the request for the 10-day pause, by March 31, 2026?" → Iran's government
- "Which national team will Italy face in the UEFA playoff final for a place at the 2026 men's World Cup, as confirmed by March 31, 2026?" → Bosnia and Herzegovina
- "Which country's navy will be reported as launching the search for two missing aid boats heading to Cuba, by March 31, 2026?" → Mexico

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (320 resolved, 10 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
